title: Surgeon Vacancy at Indraprastha Apollo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Indraprastha Apollo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indraprastha Apollo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Indraprastha Apollo:
Indraprastha Apollo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
